data.title: Data: Over 13,000 BTC flowed out of Coinbase Pro exchange wallet in the past 7 days
data.description: The latest data from Coinglass shows that 13,383.09 bitcoins have flowed out of the Coinbase Pro exchange in the past week, 9,402.96 bitcoins have flowed into the Binance wallet in the past 7 days, and 6,681.80 bitcoins have flowed into the Bitfinex wallet in the past 7 days.

data.title: Analyzing Wrapped Tokens: New Trends and Risks Ahead
data.description:
TL;DR Wrapped tokens have improved interoperability in DeFi by enabling the use of assets on blockchains where they are not native, increasing market liquidity. Emerging trends, such as cross-chain bridges and programmable wrapped tokens, aim to reduce reliance on centralized custodians and improve the system’s security and efficiency. Despite their benefits, wrapped tokens present some ......
source: https://crypto-economy.com/analyzing-wrapped-tokens-new-trends-and-risks-ahead/

data.title: WEMIX announces regional service restrictions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News WEMIX announced that in order to comply with applicable laws and regulatory requirements, it will restrict access to its services in certain jurisdictions, including Singapore. Users in restricted countries may not be able to use or only have limited access to its services.
Affected services include WEMIX official website, WEMIX Stake, WEMIX Explorer, 40 WONDERS, Wepublic (webpage and application), NILE, PNIX DEX, Kurrency and KLEVA. It is scheduled to be implemented at 11:00 (GMT+9) on October 2, 2024, and the time may change.

data.title: Japan Considers High Tax Rate On Crypto Assets
data.description: According to PANews, Japanese Finance Minister Kato Katsunobu discussed the potential imposition of a 110% tax rate on cryptocurrency assets during a House of Representatives Budget Committee meeting. This rate, which combines inheritance tax, income tax, and resident tax, could be applied under current laws. Kato noted that this high tax rate is not exclusive to cryptocurrency assets and would only be applicable in cases of exceptionally high profits.
